techniques.name: Mobile EEG Authentication
techniques.description: EEG-based authentication technique designed for mobile devices that relies on a separate server to collect and analyze EEG signals.
sources: @article{klonovsIDProofGo2013,  title = {{{ID Proof}} on the {{Go}}: {{Development}} of a {{Mobile EEG-Based Biometric Authentication System}}},  author = {Klonovs, Juris and Petersen, Christoffer Kjeldgaard and Olesen, Henning and Hammershoj, Allan},  year = {2013},  month = mar,  journal = {IEEE Vehicular Technology Magazine},  volume = {8},  number = {1},  pages = {81--89},  issn = {1556-6080},  doi = {10.1109/MVT.2012.2234056}}
